name: nvim-here
title: Nvim Here
description: Find the current working directory in Finder, `cd` to the directory in kitty term, and launch `nvim .`.
author: harrison_weiss

commands.name: launch
commands.title: Edit This
commands.description: Launches nvim in the current Finder directory.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
